name: Iso11783IL_TIMSetCertificateSequence
title: Iso11783IL_TIMSetCertificateSequence
syntax: long Iso11783IL_TIMSetCertificateSequence(dword certificateType1, dword certificateType2, dword certificateType3, dword certificateType4); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_TIMSetCertificateSequence(dbNode participant, dword certificateType1, dword certificateType2, dword certificateType3, dword certificateType4); // form 2
description: Sets the sequence of requested certificates.
Use this function to change the sequence of requested certificates. By default the following sequence is used:

parameters.name: certificateType2
parameters.description: Type of second requested certificate. Default value: 2 (Manufacturer certificate).

parameters.name: certificateType3
parameters.description: Type of third requested certificate. Default value: 3 (Manufacturer series certificate).

parameters.name: certificateType4
parameters.description: Type of fourth requested certificate. Default value: 4 (Device certificate).

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: TIM participant (TIM server or TIM client).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
